concept: Engineer an arcade game where you control a sentient factory automation system attempting to maintain production while the factory structure itself is constantly reconfiguring. Conveyor paths suddenly change direction, assembly stations relocate, and storage systems periodically reorganize according to mysterious algorithms beyond your control. Resource management involves redirecting material flows through improvised pathways while reprogramming robotic workers to adapt to shifting workstation layouts. Production goals become increasingly complex, requiring synchronization of multiple assembly lines despite unpredictable factory metamorphosis. The narrative gradually reveals that the factory is actually a massive organism evolving in response to your production patterns, with the final challenge involving establishing communication with the factory consciousness to achieve symbiotic stability.
